tracks.speechText: Turn any idea into a complete Coh-dex theme. This Build Week plugin brings decks themes' studio and community directly into the conversation. I asked for a theme inspired by Argentina football at night and named it Argentina Afterglow.
decks themes previews the full workspace, not just swatches. Choose a variant, copy its import, and open Coh-dex Appearance. Paste, import, done. The theme is yours. No account required.
The catalog is conversational. Search official Coh-dex themes, decks themes releases, and community submissions. Compare full previews and see daily, weekly, monthly, and historical leaders.
Get Hub sign-in appears only when I publish. I review the name and both variants, approve the public action, and keep verified creator credit.
Creators track themes, rankings, daily and weekly wins, and achievements in one dashboard, where stats grow and new achievements unlock with each milestone.
Because decks themes is open source, users can turn product feedback into a ready-to-review Get Hub issue from the same conversation.
G P T five point six interprets the creative intent. The M C P server validates names, colors, identity, and public actions. The visual app keeps every preview and decision in context.
Personal themes, community discovery, and creator recognition, all in one Coh-dex conversation. decks themes is open source and built for the community.
